Weekly Summary: Mumbai_City District

Week 14: (06 April 2026 - 11 April 2026)

Co-operation, Textiles and Marketing Department

Regarding the provision of funds for the payment of pending dues to the Maharashtra State Handloom Cooperative Federation Ltd., Mumbai.

Districts: Mumbai
202603311....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 31 Mar 2026

Home Department

Regarding the disbursement of the 33rd quarterly installment of funds for the maintenance and repair of the Mumbai City CCTV Project.

Districts: Mumbai
202603311....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 31 Mar 2026

Regarding the disbursement of funds totaling Rs. 5,21,12,204/- (inclusive of taxes) to the Additional Director General of Police, Maharashtra State Cyber, Mumbai, in recognition of the effective public awareness campaign conducted regarding cybercrimes via MahaRail (LED/LCD) screens at railway stations across the State.

Districts: Mumbai
202603301....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 30 Mar 2026

Minorities Development Department

Regarding the disbursement of grants for the office expenditure of the Maharashtra State Minorities Commission, Mumbai, for the financial year 2025-26.

Funds: Rs. 29.23 lakh Districts: Mumbai
202603301....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 30 Mar 2026

Public Health Department

Regarding transfer of funds through re-appropriation from Account Head 2210 1044 26-Advertisement and publicity to Account Head 22100164 31-Subsidiary Grants (Non-Salary) for the purchase of Mobile Eye Surgical Unit under National Blindness and Visual Impairment Control Programme in the financial year 2025-26.

Funds: Rs.22100164.31 crore Districts: Mumbai
202603301....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 30 Mar 2026

Regarding the transfer of funds through re-appropriation from Account Head 2210J994 under Item 11- Travelling Allowance and Daily Allowance, 17- Computer Expenses to Account Head 22100217 21, Supplies and Materials for the purchase of psychiatric medicines, linen and other items for the Regional Psychiatric Hospital in the financial year 2025-26.

Districts: Mumbai
202603301....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 30 Mar 2026

Regarding granting approval to spend Rs. 25 crore by distributing under the budget distribution system 31-grant-in-aid (non-salary) or under account head 2210 0119, for the purchase of necessary medical equipment, instruments and equipment for 25 primary health centers and 202 sub-centers where 100 percent construction is completed in the state in the year 2025-26 or the financial year.

Funds: Rs. 25 crore Districts: Mumbai
202603301....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 30 Mar 2026

Regarding the redistribution of Rs. 52.27 lakh grant under Account Head 22100291 Chapter-27-Small Constructions for the payment of pending electricity bills of the Regional Psychiatric Hospital for the financial year 2025-26 under the same Account Head 06-Telephone, Electricity and Water.

Districts: Mumbai
202603311....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 31 Mar 2026

Regarding the approval for the distribution and expenditure of funds amounting to Rs. 4,20,00,000/- through the Budgetary Distribution Systemunder the Head of Account 2210 3047 and the Object Head 31-Grants-in-aid (Non-Salary)for the purpose of making payments towards hospital linen required for the States Divisional Referral Services, District, Womens, General, Rural, Cottage, and other hospitals during the financial year 2025-26.

Districts: Mumbai
202603311....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 31 Mar 2026

Tourism and Cultural Affairs Department

Regarding the allocation of funds for the repair, modern-style renovation, and supply of furniture for the cabins, anti-chambers, lift lobby, and P.A. cabins within the proposed administrative block located on the first floor of the Ravindra Natyamandir building at Prabhadevi, Mumbai.
